# Supported Surface Matrix

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-supported-surface-matrix.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

This matrix records the currently supported React component surface. It is a
readiness view, not a promise that every component is production complete.

Maturity labels:

- **Hardened starter**: source, contract, preview, unit tests, browser smoke
  coverage, and targeted a11y/focus/interaction assertions exist for the risky
  primitive behavior.
- **Starter**: source, contract, preview, unit tests, and browser smoke coverage
  exist, with a11y behavior documented or covered at the contract/state level.
- **Uncovered**: a required source, contract, preview, or unit reference is
  missing and the component should not be considered supported.

| Component | Maturity | Source | Docs | Preview | Tests | A11y / focus coverage | Known gaps |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ActionMenu | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/action-menu.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/action-menu.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/action-menu.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Interactive roles, labels, state attributes, and keyboard/focus behavior are covered by unit tests or Radix-backed contracts. | ActionMenu does not include search or nested choices. |
| ActionWidget | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/action-widget.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/action-widget.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/action-widget.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Slots, roles or ARIA state where applicable, content resilience, and browser preview layout are covered. | ActionWidget does not enforce one primary action.; ActionWidget does not provide loading, disclosure, or selection behavior.; ActionWidget does not infer heading semantics from `ActionWidgetTitle`. |
| Amount | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/amount.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/amount.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/amount.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Slots, roles or ARIA state where applicable, content resilience, and browser preview layout are covered. | Amount does not parse formatted input text back into numeric values.; Amount does not provide menus for selecting currencies or assets.; Amount does not own form labels, submit behavior, or validation summaries. |
| Avatar | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/avatar.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/avatar.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/avatar.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Slots, roles or ARIA state where applicable, content resilience, and browser preview layout are covered. | Avatar does not provide tooltips, menus, or profile popovers.; AvatarGroup does not calculate overflow counts.; AvatarBadge does not define a status vocabulary. |
| Badge | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/badge.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/badge.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/badge.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Slots, roles or ARIA state where applicable, content resilience, and browser preview layout are covered. | Badge does not provide live region behavior.; Badge does not enforce short copy.; Badge does not polyfill disabled or pressed behavior for `asChild` children. |
| BottomSheet | Hardened starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/bottom-sheet.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/bottom-sheet.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/bottom-sheet.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Modal role, naming, description, close path, Escape dismissal, return focus, portal composition. | BottomSheet only supports bottom placement.; BottomSheet does not provide route transitions or app-owned submission logic.; BottomSheet does not implement drag-to-dismiss. |
| Breadcrumbs | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/breadcrumbs.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/breadcrumbs.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/breadcrumbs.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Slots, roles or ARIA state where applicable, content resilience, and browser preview layout are covered. | Breadcrumbs does not insert separators automatically. |

| Dialog | Hardened starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/dialog.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/dialog.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/dialog.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Modal role, naming, description, close path, Escape dismissal, return focus, portal composition. | Dialog does not provide alert-dialog semantics.; Dialog does not include form submission behavior.; Dialog does not provide nested route or full-screen workflow patterns. |
| FilterChip | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/filter-chip.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/filter-chip.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/filter-chip.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Slots, roles or ARIA state where applicable, content resilience, and browser preview layout are covered. | FilterChip does not open a popover or menu by itself.; FilterChip does not manage filter selection state.; FilterChip does not validate Material Symbols names at runtime. |
| Icon | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/icon.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/icon.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/icon.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Slots, roles or ARIA state where applicable, content resilience, and browser preview layout are covered. | Icon depends on Google Fonts unless the consuming environment overrides the Material Symbols font with a self-hosted equivalent.; Icon does not validate symbol names at runtime. |

| Item | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/item.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/item.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/item.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Slots, roles or ARIA state where applicable, content resilience, and browser preview layout are covered. | Item does not manage grouped lists, virtualization, menus, or nested route behavior.; Item does not parse money input text; AmountInput owns display formatting and consumers own validation and submission.; Item does not enforce one primary action or one side value. |

## Maintenance

- Run `pnpm docs:reference:sync` after adding or changing component source,
  previews, or known limitations.
- Keep deeper interaction coverage on the hardened starter path for Dialog,
  BottomSheet, Menu, Select, Popover, Toast, and Tabs.
- Add true browser-level focus-trap assertions only when the preview harness can
  drive modal focus without making every story stateful.
